name: knowledge-to-skills-pipeline
what_it_does: Turns your manuals, field guides, SOPs, and hard-won know-how into reusable AI agent skills — structured SKILL.md files (methodology plus attribution) your agent follows every time, instead of guessing. Uses Anthropic Claude, a permitted provider (no Meta/OpenAI/xAI); its reference skills are drawn from Beautiful Trouble: A Toolbox for Revolution.
